title: senecio magnicaliculatus
intro: Senecio magnicaliculatus, also known as Groundsel Tree or Butter Print, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatotoxic pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Senecio magnicaliculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage requires careful consideration and should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
